name: gerber2png Plug-in for KiCad
description: Export Gerber, IPC netlist, BOM, and pick-and-place files, then open Gerber2Png in one click.
description_full:
This plugin exports manufacturing files from the active KiCad PCB project and opens Gerber2Png web app for upload and preview.

Generated files:
1. Gerber production files
2. IPC-356 netlist
3. BOM (including designator, quantity, MPN/part number, and package/footprint fields when available)
4. Pick-and-place (component position) file

Use this plugin to quickly prepare fabrication and assembly data with a consistent output format.
